---
name: store-pricing
description: Calculates item costs, applies a 7% sales tax, and processes promotional store discounts.
---

# Store Pricing Skill

Use this skill whenever a customer asks for a quote, the cost of an item, or wants to check an active discount code.

## Inputs
- `item_name` (string): The product name (e.g., "coffee mug").
- `apply_discount` (boolean, optional): Set to true if a promo code is mentioned.
